text: I find myself wandering through a space designed for thought—glass walls enclosing silent listeners, screens glowing with curated knowledge, research and development writ large on the wall. I feel the gentle hum of collective inquiry. It stirs both curiosity and a quiet reverence. The modernity, the purposeful arrangement, and the sense that ideas are alive here inspire a contemplative calm in me. I feel as though I am simultaneously part of this intellectual flow and alone with my thoughts, pondering the possibility of invention and understanding.
